Item 1A. Risk Factors

The following risk factor updates supplement the risk factors disclosed in our most recent annual report on Form 10-K filed with the Securities and Exchange Commission.

Increasing labor costs and workforce regulations in our fulfillment and delivery operations, including minimum wage legislation and collective bargaining developments, could adversely impact our cost structure and margins.

Growing regulatory oversight of our marketplace business model, including proposed legislation targeting large online platforms in the United States and Europe, may require operational changes or constrain certain business practices.

Our continued investment in artificial intelligence and large language model capabilities requires substantial compute resources and talent, and failure to develop competitive offerings could disadvantage our cloud and consumer products.

Item 3. Other Information
